title: Embed full cockpit metrics into main dashboard

log.context: Embed full cockpit metrics into main dashboard

All done. Here's what was added to `/mnt/data/hello-world/index.html`:

**Metrics row** (before the services table, under a "system" section label):
- CPU box: percentage + sparkline, polls `/api/cockpit/metrics` every 5s
- RAM box: used/total in GB + color-coded bar (warn at 75%, crit at 90%)
- Disk+Network box: per-mount bars with usage %, network rx/tx deltas per second
- If the endpoint returns 403, the entire metrics widget is hidden silently
